name: Dead Island
description: Survive a tropical paradise overrun by the undead. Craft weapons, scavenge resources, and fight your way off the island.

name: EA Sports FC 26
description: The latest installment in EA's football simulation franchise, featuring updated rosters and improved gameplay mechanics.

name: Cyberpunk 2077
description: An open-world action RPG set in the dystopian Night City, where you play as mercenary V chasing a legend that grants immortality.

name: Elden Ring
description: An open-world action RPG crafted by FromSoftware and George R.R. Martin, set in the shattered realm known as the Lands Between.

name: Grand Theft Auto VI
description: Rockstar's long-awaited return to Vice City, following dual protagonists including the franchise's first playable female lead.

name: Baldur's Gate 3
description: A story-rich turn-based RPG set in the Dungeons & Dragons universe, featuring deep choices, co-op play, and branching consequences.

name: Hades II
description: The sequel to the acclaimed roguelike, following Melinoe, Princess of the Underworld, on her quest against the Titan of Time.

name: Infinity Blade
description: A sword-fighting RPG where you face the God King and his immortal army through a mysterious castle, mastering combat across generations.

name: Infinity Blade II
description: The sequel expands the world with new locations, weapon classes, and a deeper story as Siris uncovers the secrets of the Infinity Blade.

name: Infinity Blade III
description: The epic conclusion to the trilogy, featuring dual protagonists Siris and Isa in the final battle against the Worker of Secrets.

name: Database Designer
description: A fun educational game. Here's an example of editing a game.
